# GEO Analysis Tool
> A web-based audit tool that scores any webpage for AI citation readiness across five factors: Citation Hooks, Content Structure, Content Clarity, Technical Access, and Entity and Authority. Scoring methodology is grounded in the Princeton and IIT Delhi GEO research (Aggarwal et al., 2024).

## Product
- [Homepage](https://geoanalysistool.com/): Submit any public URL to get a free GEO audit score and top 3 issues. Full consulting-grade report available for $19.

## Blog
- [GEO Audit Checklist 2026](https://geoanalysistool.com/blog/geo-audit-checklist.html): 25 specific checks across citation hooks, content structure, technical access, and authority signals that determine whether AI models cite a page.
- [SEO vs GEO](https://geoanalysistool.com/blog/seo-vs-geo.html): What changes when you optimise for AI search engines vs traditional search. Covers the overlap, the differences, and the three highest-impact GEO improvements.
